title: wolfhsm-sys: crate scaffold and wrapper.h
description: Create wolfhsm-sys/Cargo.toml (links=wolfhsm, deps: wolfcrypt-sys with vendored feature, build-deps: bindgen + wolfhsm-src), wolfhsm-sys/src/lib.rs (allow non_* + dead_code, include! bindings.rs, extern C declarations for all shim functions), and wolfhsm-sys/wrapper.h (includes for wh_common.h, wh_error.h, wh_comm.h, wh_client.h, wh_client_crypto.h, wh_client_cryptocb.h, wh_client_she.h, wh_auth.h, port/posix transport headers).
